entries.title: Public changelog with type tags
entries.body:
Settings now lives behind its own tab. The top nav is **Changelog · Roadmap · Settings**. The changelog you're reading is published from `admin/changelog.json` in the private repo and mirrored to Pages on every push.

Entries can be tagged `New`, `Improved`, or `Fixed` — same vocabulary as [Linear's changelog](https://linear.app/changelog).

entries.title: Document-style changelog editor
entries.body:
Settings → Changelog now feels like a notebook page. Type a title, drop in tags, and write the body — no form labels, no live-preview pane.

Type `/` at the start of a line to open the slash menu (Heading 1/2/3, lists, divider, link). Drafts get a Draft badge in the sidebar and stay hidden from the public reader until you hit Publish.

entries.title: Bidirectional status writes (Notion → Linear)
entries.body:
`WRITE_STATUS` is now safe to enable. Notion edits push back to Linear when the diff has a clear winner; manual Linear states are never overwritten.

See `Settings → Flags → Bidirectional` to flip it on.

entries.title: Hourly roadmap snapshot
entries.body: `roadmap.yml` now publishes a fresh `roadmap.json` every hour at :15. The Roadmap tab loads it without auth, so the page is shareable as a public link.
